title: Feelings on alternate live action EoE segment
display_title: Feelings on alternate live action EoE segment
wikitext:
[]: Feelings on alternate live action EoE segment...             Quote Post by rip3mwk » Mon Feb 13, 2006 3:22 pm I personally love the 11odd minutes of live action footage and find it to be a shame that it was chopped up just to make a trailer. Anyone know what happened here? - I guess all directors have their cutting board moments of retardation... So who out there would've kept it in and who would've chopped it off, I mean why get rid of it? I think it really gives you a feel for the real world and the "alternate universe" deal going on in 25 & 26. This is one of the things that I believe to set Eva apart from your average anime, it's simple yet brilliant. By the way, does anyone have this w/ a fan sub attatched in the video... I'd love to view it w/ subtitles. Yes, I've read the translation.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 13, 2006 3:51 pm Probably worth editing the title to say "alternate live action segment" - as opposed to the crowd scenes and cinema audience that remain. That section would have been the obvious equivalent/counterpoint to the panty-flash-Rei school AU segment of EoTV, even though I can't quite believe Asuka as an office lady, rather than a Ritsuko-style neurotic academic.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Feb 13, 2006 4:09 pm http://www.evamonkey.com/alternate_live_action.php I believe the one there is subbed.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Feb 13, 2006 4:11 pm Why did Anno leave this on the cutting room flor again?

[]: Re: Feelings on alternate live action EoE segment...             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 13, 2006 4:12 pm rip3mwk wrote: By the way, does anyone have this w/ a fan sub attatched in the video... I'd love to view it w/ subtitles. Yes, I've read the translation.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Feb 13, 2006 4:13 pm I see your point oh wise monkey.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Tue Feb 14, 2006 9:08 am DatDude wrote: I see your point oh wise monkey.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Feb 14, 2006 10:09 am And let's not forget the all important fact that Asuka, Rei, and Misato are portrayed by their seiyuus, and we don't want to give those fanboys any more encouragement by giving their favorite fwap material human form.

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Tue Feb 14, 2006 1:17 pm I personally enjoyed the extended LA sequence posted on this website, but I am glad that it was not included in the movie. The shortened version in the movie was just what was needed: Short and sweet. That way the original LA sequence could be left for the hardcore Eva fans to find and think about.
